## Final Market Intelligence Report (MNQ / MES Focus)

### 1) Executive Summary
Today’s dominant chain was **geopolitics → crude oil strength → inflation/rates repricing → pressure on growth/tech beta**, with **MNQ showing higher directional sensitivity than MES**. Risk stayed headline-driven, and intraday reactions were sharper around energy and rate signals than around single-company news.
